description: Every Apple framework, indexed locally, with deprecation analysis and an MCP server no other Apple-docs tool has.

tools.name: doc_get
tools.description: Fetch a specific doc page by path. The path is the lowercase-slashed identifier under /documentation/, e.g., 'swiftui', 'swiftui/view', or 'swiftui/view/onappear(perform:)'. Required: path. Returns the DocPage.

tools.name: index_get
tools.description: Fetch a framework's full hierarchical index. Useful for offline FTS sync. Indexes are large (500KB–2MB). Required: framework. Returns the FrameworkIndex.

tools.name: technologies_list
tools.description: Fetch the master technologies index — every Apple framework, grouped by topic. Returns the TechnologiesIndex.
